positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast illustration of a mystical fox silhouette sitting atop a stack of geometric celestial bodies and intertwined vines. The style is neo-folk art mixed with Art Nouveau, featuring deep indigo blues, earthy terracotta reds, and pops of glowing gold leaf. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a circular emblem print. Detailed line work, minimal gradient usage, perfect symmetry, ethereal glow emanating from the fox's tail, highly illustrative, vector-like quality, designed for apparel printing.
negative: blur, lowres, grainy, text, watermark, signature, noise, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photographic, poor details
